---

## Key Decisions Log

| Date | Decision | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-05-13 | Next.js App Router over Pages Router | Server components, streaming, better DX |
| 2026-05-13 | Supabase over custom Express API | Managed Postgres, RLS, Realtime = 3x less infra |
| 2026-05-13 | Multi-workspace deferred to v2 | Reduces auth complexity, ships MVP faster |
| 2026-05-13 | Resend for email over Sendgrid | Better DX, React Email templates |
